'''Repulsorlift skates''' were a type of unique [[repulsor boots]] to the [[Nimbus commando]]s of [[Jabiim/Legends|Jabiim]].<ref name="GaW" />

==Characteristics==
A signature piece of gear to the [[Nimbus commando]]s of [[Jabiim/Legends|Jabiim]], repulsorlift skates were a type of [[boot]] equipped with [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlifts]] in the heels, allowing the user to float up to three meters above land or water,<ref name="GaW" /> and [[Engine|thrusters]] in the calves that propelled the wearer up to ninety-five kilometers per hour.<ref name="GaW" /> These boots made a visual distortion when active, with the thruster assembly being extremely explosive and vulnerable to [[blaster]] fire.<ref name="GaW" />

==History==
The [[Nimbus commando]]s of [[Jabiim/Legends|Jabiim]] used repulsorlift skates to navigate the muddy world of [[Jabiim/Legends|Jabiim]], considered untraversable by [[Walker/Legends|walkers]] and other such conventions.<ref name="GaW" /> With these skates, the Nimbus Commandos were considered nearly unstoppable on their homeworld, and used the skates to incredible military effect during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="GaW" /> Using the skates, squads of three could penetrate enemy lines with ease, reach heavy equipment and [[Walker/Legends|walkers]], and destroy them with charges and grenades.<ref name="GaW" /> Commandos would then scatter [[Mine/Legends|mines]] behind them in retreat - their skates' repulsors allowing them to glide over the mines without detonating them.<ref name="GaW" />
